eventPreCondition: Play on the table if Denethor is in play and not Awakened.
eventText:
While this card is in play, Denethor cannot be awakened,
and the Free Peoples player cannot use Combat cards for battles fought in Minas Tirith
or in the region with Denethor.
combatPreCondition: Play if an Isengard Army unit is in the battle and the defending Army is in a Stronghold.
combatText: Add 1 to all dice on your Combat roll.
